Caption:
(A) The sketch illustrates the Cenozoic weathering history of the Th u ringisches Schiefergebirge close to Hohen- leuben (Berga anticline): Tertiary peneplanation and kaolini- zation is followed by post-Pleistocene deep valley cutting and ‘‘bleaching’’ (organic matter oxidation) of black slates, (B) the outcrop consists of white/gray slates in the upper section, approximately $3\,\mathrm{m}$ in thickness.
